stage_identity.evidence: Candidate shows a round blue blob character with visible gangly legs — Byte's teen-stage form. Previous reference image had drifted to a realistic human boy with dark hair, completely losing blob identity. Reground successfully restored Byte as a blob creature with round body and extended limbs consistent with teen stage anchor.

pixel_style.evidence: Candidate exhibits clean pixel art style with dithered shading, clearly readable silhouette, and flat color forms on the character and environment. Pixel grid visible on laptop edges and desk surface.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Reground requested restoration to canonical blob form with afternoon light, relaxed ecstatic pose, proper prop layout. Candidate shows: blue blob Byte with wide happy eyes at desk, warm golden afternoon light streaming from Chicago window on upper left, relaxed posture with arms on desk.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, or malformed anatomy visible. Character anatomy is clean — round body, two legs, two arms, no duplication. Desk and laptop edges are clean, no smear or bleed artifacts.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Trophy shelf: exactly one gold trophy on the left side, exactly one green plant on the right side, clear spacing between them — no overlap, no duplication. Food bowl: exactly one food bowl on the floor to the right of the desk, clear gap between bowl and desk legs. Prop count verified: 1 trophy, 1 plant, 1 bowl.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk: visible wooden desk centered in foreground. Oversized laptop: large grey laptop open on desk, proportionally larger than Byte. Chicago skyline window: visible upper left with city building silhouettes and warm golden afternoon glow backlit.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: State shows time_of_day=afternoon (2:44 PM local), mood=ecstatic, is_sleeping=false. Candidate shows warm golden afternoon light from window, Byte with wide open bright eyes and happy expression, relaxed seated posture — matches afternoon + ecstatic + awake flags correctly.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Reference live image (codepet.png) showed severe identity drift: realistic human boy character with dark messy hair, human face features, human body proportions — completely departed from Byte's blob form. Additionally had duplicate trophy artifacts (one floating near window frame, one on shelf). Candidate corrects all: (1) human character replaced with correct blue blob Byte, (2) duplicate trophy artifact removed, only one trophy on shelf left side, (3) canonical blob silhouette with teen-stage legs restored, (4) pixel art style fully recovered from the semi-realistic rendering of the previous image.
